name: My work back injury claim got denied in Saint George, now what?
description: Appeal within 20 days to Utah Labor Commission with medical proof.

mainEntity.name: My work back injury claim got denied in Saint George, now what?

acceptedAnswer.text: Appeal within 20 days to Utah Labor Commission with medical proof.
acceptedAnswer.description:
**Appeal to Utah Labor Commission within 20 days of denial.**

Carriers deny using 'course of employment' arguments, but hearings reverse many.[1] Gather medical evidence showing work causation.

- Request denial reasons in writing.
- File formal objection timely.
- Get independent medical exam.

Hire an attorney experienced in Utah comp hearings; they won back pay, interest, and future care in similar cases.[1] Don't accept denial.
